visa_type_detail.description: Visa authorization granting a one-year permit to reside and work throughout the national territory of Spain for international teleworkers – digital nomads.
requirements: Foreign nationals who wish to carry out remote work or professional activities for companies located outside Spain, using exclusively computer, telematic, or telecommunications means.
Foreign nationals who perform salaried work for companies located outside Spain.

Foreign nationals who carry out self-employed activities (as freelancers) and may also work for companies located in Spain, provided that the percentage of such work does not exceed 20% of their total activity.
documentation: Recent passport-size color photograph with a light background
Original and photocopy of the page(s) containing biometric data from the passport (valid for at least 1 year, two blank pages, issued within the last 10 years)
Proof of legal residence in the country where the application is submitted
For representatives: copy of representative’s ID or passport and power of attorney or document proving representation

Company certificate stating: a) For salaried workers: length of service (not less than three months) and express authorization for remote work. b) For self-employed teleworkers: length of contractual relationship (not less than three months) and remote work terms.
Certificate from the Commercial Registry (or equivalent authority) showing company's incorporation date (not less than one year) and activity type.
Responsible declaration (company or self-employed worker) confirming commitment to comply with social security obligations.

a) For salaried teleworkers: proof of application for company’s registration with Spanish Social Security and proof of worker’s affiliation. b) For self-employed workers: proof of registration with RETA.
Documentation proving financial resources: a)Teleworker: 200% of the minimum interprofessional wage (SMI) per month. b) Family members: 75% of SMI for first dependent, 25% for each additional member.
Original and copy of a graduate or postgraduate degree from a recognized university/institution, or documents proving a minimum of three years of professional experience in similar roles.
For regulated professions, proof of recognition of the necessary qualification.
Application for a Foreign Identification Number (NIE) at the same time as the visa.
requirements_to_be_considered: Not be in an irregular situation within Spanish territory.

Have no criminal record in Spain and in the countries of residence for the last two years (for offenses under Spanish law). Responsible declaration of absence of criminal records for the last five years.
Not appear as inadmissible in the territorial space of countries with which Spain has signed an agreement.
Have public or private health insurance contracted with an authorized insurance company in Spain.
Have sufficient financial resources for self and family members.
Pay the fee for processing the authorization or visa.
tax_benefits: Payment of a fixed tax rate of 24% on work-related income up to €600,000, and 48% on any amount exceeding this limit.
Reduction of the capital gains tax, applying a variable rate from 19% to 28%.
Eased conditions to access the reduced tax rate (IRNR), reducing the required non-tax-residency period from 10 to 5 years.

eligible_members: Spouse (not legally or de facto separated, marriage not entered into fraudulently)
Person maintaining a relationship analogous to marriage (registered in a public registry or proven unregistered relationship established prior to sponsor's residence in Spain)
Children under eighteen years of age, or with a disability preventing them from meeting their own needs (includes adopted children)
Persons legally represented by the sponsor, under eighteen or with a disability preventing them from meeting their own needs

Ascendants in the first degree (over sixty-five years of age, dependent, and reasons justifying the need to authorize residence; exceptionally under sixty-five for humanitarian reasons; or spouse/partner of an ascendant over sixty-five).
family_reunification.dependency_proof: Sponsor has transferred funds or borne expenses for the family member amounting to at least 51% of the annual per capita gross domestic product of the family member’s country of residence.

essential_apps.description: Digital identity system for accessing Spanish public administration services.
Access your personal data and administrative procedures with the Spanish public administration.
Popular app for restaurant reservations and finding local eateries.
One of Spain's largest banks, offering a comprehensive mobile banking app.
Excellent public transport planner for major Spanish cities.
